nodes.label: AI as quick research tool for tax legislation
nodes.grounding_span: I use it to quickly research new topics, for example looking at the correct treatment of a certain benefit in kind

nodes.label: AI as Excel formula assistant
nodes.grounding_span: AI has proved really useful when working with excel, using it to convert data into usable insights without being a formula whizz

nodes.label: AI reliability and need for double-checking
nodes.grounding_span: I would normal double check the information provided

nodes.label: AI suitability for large datasets
nodes.grounding_span: Some tasks like reviewing bank statements AI would be helpful with, however, I do this myself as it includes large datasets where double checking the AIs work would result in me doing the work anyway

nodes.label: Human investigative gut instinct
nodes.grounding_span: I feel that the difference between AI and myself in my work would be an investigative 'gut instinct' which would be harder to train into AI

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: breaking it down into per year figures automatically without filtering or manually breaking the information down

nodes.label: Accuracy and reputational integrity
nodes.grounding_span: not doing so could lead to reputational damage

nodes.label: Investigative discovery and human judgment
nodes.grounding_span: sometimes going off track produces a better result

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for Excel tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI has proved really useful when working with excel

nodes.label: Caution due to need for double-checking
nodes.grounding_span: I would normal double check the information provided

nodes.label: Resistance to AI for large datasets due to overhead
nodes.grounding_span: double checking the AIs work would result in me doing the work anyway, meaning there would be no time saved

nodes.label: Optimism about future trust and reliance
nodes.grounding_span: As AI improves, I can see myself relying on it more and trusting it more, requiring less double-checking

nodes.label: Verification-oriented approach — double-checks AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: I would normal double check the information provided

nodes.label: Cost-benefit analysis of AI use — evaluates time saved vs verification effort
nodes.grounding_span: double checking the AIs work would result in me doing the work anyway, meaning there would be no time saved
